title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed via simple async/sync API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, file upload, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; chat & generate with blocks-based streaming.

title: ollama-cli (go)
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Go; browse models, chat, show prompts.

title: ollama-copilot.vim
summary: Experimental Neovim plugin that connects Copilot.vim to local Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models for generative QA and embeddings.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats using any Ollama model; slash commands & threads.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-camunda-connector
summary: Camunda 8 connector that invokes Ollama models inside BPMN processes.

title: ollama-fastapi-stream
summary: FastAPI template exposing Ollama with Server-Sent-Events streaming and OpenAPI docs.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate for Ollama with Tokio async and streaming support.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform desktop chat client for Ollama built with Qt6 and C++.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper around Ollama HTTP API with GenServer-friendly streaming.

title: ollama-django-chat
summary: Django + HTMX chat app that keeps state server-side and streams Ollama responses.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt bot that answers questions using local Ollama models with thread support.
